basic_info.insurer_name: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited

silver_plan.icu_coverage: Covered under ICU Charges - includes ICU bed, general medical support services, monitoring devices, critical care nursing and intensivist charges

coverage_features.coverage_details: Proportionate deduction applies to expenses that vary based on room rent if insured chooses higher category
coverage_features.notes: Proportionate deductions not applied for hospitals without differential billing

coverage_features.feature_name: Surgeon, Anesthetist, Medical Practitioner, Consultants, Specialist Fees
coverage_features.coverage_details: Covered as part of hospitalization expenses
coverage_features.notes: Subject to proportionate deduction based on room rent

coverage_features.coverage_details: Covers Anesthesia, Blood, Oxygen, Operation Theatre charges, ICU Charges, Surgical Appliances, Medicines and Drugs, Diagnostic Materials, X-ray, Pacemaker
coverage_features.notes: Coronary stenting costs as per DPCO/NPPA Capping

coverage_features.coverage_details: Medical expenses immediately before hospitalization
coverage_features.notes: Not counted for calculating deductible

coverage_features.coverage_details: Medical expenses immediately after discharge
coverage_features.notes: Not counted for calculating deductible

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Varies by treatment and sum insured
coverage_features.coverage_details: Covers Balloon Sinuplasty, Deep Brain Stimulation, Oral Chemotherapy, Immunotherapy-Monoclonal Antibody injections, Intra Vitreal injections, Uterine artery Embolization and HIFU, Stereotactic radio surgeries, Bronchical Thermoplasty, Vaporisation of prostate, IONM, Stem cell therapy for bone marrow transplant, Robotic surgeries
coverage_features.notes: Sublimits all inclusive with or without hospitalization

coverage_features.coverage_details: Inpatient hospitalization expenses for treatment under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems in AYUSH Hospital
coverage_features.notes: Claims under Yoga and Naturopathy subject to prior approval from company

coverage_features.coverage_details: All day care procedures are covered
coverage_features.notes: Treatment taken in less than 24 hours which would have otherwise required hospitalization of more than 24 hours

gold_plan.icu_coverage: Covered under ICU Charges - includes ICU bed, general medical support services, monitoring devices, critical care nursing and intensivist charges

coverage_features.feature_name: Room, Boarding, Nursing Expenses - Gold Plan
coverage_features.coverage_details: Proportionate deduction applies to expenses that vary based on room rent if insured chooses higher category
coverage_features.notes: Proportionate deductions not applied for hospitals without differential billing

coverage_features.feature_name: Surgeon, Anesthetist, Medical Practitioner, Consultants, Specialist Fees - Gold Plan
coverage_features.coverage_details: Covered as part of hospitalization expenses. Includes Anesthesia, Blood, Oxygen, OT charges, ICU charges, Surgical Appliances, Medicines, Drugs, Diagnostic Materials, X-ray, Pacemaker
coverage_features.notes: Coronary stenting costs as per DPCO/NPPA Capping

coverage_features.coverage_details: For transportation by private ambulance service when needed for medical reasons
coverage_features.notes: Provided hospitalization claim is admissible

coverage_features.coverage_details: From place of first occurrence to nearest appropriate hospital on advice of treating medical practitioner
coverage_features.notes: Applicable for sum insured of Rs.7 lakhs and above. Subject to admissible hospitalization claim. Air ambulance must be duly licensed

coverage_features.coverage_details: Facility to obtain E Medical Opinion from Company's expert panel based on medical records submitted
coverage_features.notes: Opinion without examining patient, for medical reasons only (not medico-legal). Company not liable for errors/omissions/consequences

coverage_features.coverage_details: Medical expenses immediately before hospitalization
coverage_features.notes: Not counted for calculating defined limit

coverage_features.coverage_details: Medical expenses immediately after discharge
coverage_features.notes: Not counted for calculating defined limit

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Rs.50,000 per policy period, max 2 deliveries in entire lifetime
coverage_features.coverage_details: Includes delivery by Caesarean section, pre-natal, post-natal expenses and lawful medical termination of pregnancy
coverage_features.notes: 12 months waiting period from first policy date. Both Self and Spouse must be covered. Pre and post hospitalization expenses not applicable. Does not reduce sum insured

coverage_features.coverage_details: Expenses for organ transplantation where insured is recipient
coverage_features.notes: Donor screening expenses and post-donation complications not payable. Subject to availability of sum insured

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Varies by treatment and sum insured
coverage_features.coverage_details: Covers Balloon Sinuplasty, Deep Brain Stimulation, Oral Chemotherapy, Immunotherapy-Monoclonal Antibody injections, Intra Vitreal injections, Uterine artery Embolization and HIFU, Stereotactic radio surgeries, Bronchical Thermoplasty, Vaporisation of prostate, IONM, Stem cell therapy for bone marrow transplant, Robotic surgeries
coverage_features.notes: Sublimits all inclusive with or without hospitalization

coverage_features.coverage_details: Inpatient hospitalization expenses for treatment under Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems in AYUSH Hospital
coverage_features.notes: Claims under Yoga and Naturopathy subject to prior approval from company

coverage_features.coverage_limit: Rs.50,000 (Defined Limit Rs.3L), Rs.75,000 (DL Rs.5L), Rs.1,00,000 (DL Rs.10L), Rs.2,50,000 (DL Rs.15L and above)
coverage_features.coverage_details: Additional indemnity provided once if sum insured exhausted during policy period. Can be used even for same hospitalization or disease for which claim paid
coverage_features.notes: Unutilized recharge amount cannot be carried forward. Not available for Modern Treatments

coverage_features.coverage_details: Online Chat with Doctor, Medical Concierge Services, Period & Fertility Tracker, Digital Health Vault, Wellness Content, Health Quiz & Gamification, Post Operative Care, Discounts from Network Providers
coverage_features.notes: Available through Star Health Mobile App. Services subject to IRDAI guidelines. For newly wedded spouse or newborn added midterm, benefit available only after 1 year of insurance cover

coverage_features.coverage_details: All day care procedures are covered
coverage_features.notes: Treatment taken in less than 24 hours which would have otherwise required hospitalization of more than 24 hours

exclusions.description: Silver Plan: Excluded until expiry of 36 months of continuous coverage. Gold Plan: Excluded until expiry of 12 months of continuous coverage
exclusions.exception_conditions: Waiting period reduced by prior coverage under portability. Coverage after waiting period subject to declaration and acceptance by insurer. In case of SI enhancement, exclusion applies afresh to enhanced amount

exclusions.exclusion_name: Specified Disease/Procedure Waiting Period - Code Excl 02
exclusions.description: Silver Plan: 24 months continuous coverage required. Gold Plan: 12 months continuous coverage required
exclusions.exception_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Waiting period reduced by prior coverage under portability. Longer waiting period applies if also covered under PED. In case of SI enhancement, exclusion applies afresh

exclusions.description: Treatment of any illness within 30 days from first policy commencement excluded
exclusions.exception_conditions: Does not apply for accidents or if insured has continuous coverage for more than 12 months. Applies to enhanced sum insured

exclusions.description: Expenses for admission primarily for diagnostics and evaluation purposes only. Diagnostic expenses not related or incidental to current diagnosis and treatment

exclusions.exclusion_name: Rest Cure, Rehabilitation and Respite Care - Code Excl 05
exclusions.description: Expenses for admission primarily for enforced bed rest, custodial care, and services for terminally ill
Surgical treatment of obesity excluded unless specific conditions met
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if: conducted upon doctor's advice, supported by clinical protocols, member 18+ years, BMI ≥40 or ≥35 with severe co-morbidities (obesity-related cardiomyopathy, coronary heart disease, severe sleep apnea, uncontrolled Type2 Diabetes) after failure of less invasive methods

exclusions.description: Any treatment including surgical management to change characteristics of body to opposite sex

exclusions.exclusion_name: Cosmetic or Plastic Surgery - Code Excl 08
exclusions.description: Expenses for cosmetic or plastic surgery or treatment to change appearance
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if for reconstruction following Accident, Burns or Cancer, or as part of medically necessary treatment to remove direct and immediate health risk (must be certified by attending Medical Practitioner)

exclusions.exclusion_name: Hazardous or Adventure Sports - Code Excl 09
exclusions.description: Treatment necessitated due to participation as professional in hazardous/adventure sports
Treatment arising from insured committing or attempting to commit breach of law with criminal intent
Treatment in hospitals or by providers specifically excluded by insurer and disclosed on website/notified to policyholders
exclusions.exception_conditions: In life threatening situations or following accident, expenses up to stabilization stage payable but not complete claim

exclusions.description: Treatment for alcoholism, drug or substance abuse or any addictive condition and consequences thereof

exclusions.exclusion_name: Health Hydros, Nature Cure Clinics, Spas - Code Excl 13
exclusions.description: Treatments in health hydros, nature cure clinics, spas or similar establishments or private beds attached to such establishments or admission for domestic reasons
Dietary supplements and substances purchasable without prescription, including vitamins, minerals and organic substances
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if prescribed by medical practitioner as part of hospitalization claim or day care procedure

exclusions.description: Treatment for correction of eye sight due to refractive error less than 7.5 dioptres
Any unproven treatment, services and supplies lacking significant medical documentation to support effectiveness
Any type of contraception, sterilization, assisted reproduction services (IVF, ZIFT, GIFT, ICSI), gestational surrogacy, reversal of sterilization
Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections), miscarriage and lawful medical termination of pregnancy
exclusions.exception_conditions: Ectopic pregnancy covered. Covered under Gold Plan Coverage III(H) with specific conditions

exclusions.description: Circumcision, Preputioplasty, Frenuloplasty, Preputial Dilatation and Removal of SMEGMA
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if necessary for treatment of disease not excluded or necessitated due to accident

exclusions.description: Congenital External Condition/Defects/Anomalies
Convalescence, general debility, run-down condition, nutritional deficiency states
Intentional self-injury
Injury/disease directly or indirectly caused by war, invasion, act of foreign enemy, warlike operations
Injury or disease directly or indirectly caused by or contributed to by nuclear weapons/materials

Enhanced External Counter Pulsation Therapy, Chelation therapy, Hyperbaric Oxygen Therapy, Rotational Field Quantum Magnetic Resonance Therapy, VAX-D, Low level laser therapy, Photodynamic therapy and similar therapies
Unconventional, Untested, Experimental therapies
Autologous derived Stromal vascular Fraction, Chondrocyte Implantation, Procedures using Platelet Rich plasma and Intra articular injection therapy
Biologicals
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered when administered as in-patient, when clinically indicated and hospitalization warranted

exclusions.exclusion_name: Priapism and Erectile Dysfunctions - Code Excl 30
exclusions.description: All treatment for Priapism and erectile dysfunctions
Inoculation or Vaccination
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered for post-bite treatment and for medical treatment for therapeutic reasons

exclusions.description: Dental treatment or surgery
exclusions.exception_conditions: Covered if necessitated due to accidental injuries and requiring hospitalization. Dental implants not payable

exclusions.exclusion_name: Sleep Apnea and Endocrine Disorders - Code Excl 33
exclusions.description: Medical and/or surgical treatment of Sleep apnea, treatment for endocrine disorders
Hospital registration charges, admission charges, record charges, telephone charges and such other charges
Cochlear implants and procedure related hospitalization expenses

exclusions.exclusion_name: Treatment Not Warranting Hospitalization - Code Excl 36
exclusions.description: Expenses for treatment of diseases/illness/accidental injuries which does not warrant hospitalization
Other Excluded Expenses as detailed in website www.starhealth.in
Existing disease/s disclosed by Insured and mentioned in policy schedule under Permanent Exclusion (based on Insured's consent)

exclusions.exclusion_name: New Born Baby Treatment - Code Excl 44
exclusions.description: Any medical expenses incurred towards treatment of New Born Baby

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Any illness
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for accidents or if insured has continuous coverage for more than 12 months

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Pre-Existing Diseases - Silver Plan
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability. Coverage after 36 months subject to declaration and acceptance

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Pre-Existing Diseases - Gold Plan
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability. Coverage after 12 months subject to declaration and acceptance

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Specified Diseases/Procedures - Silver Plan
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Specified Diseases/Procedures - Gold Plan
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Does not apply for claims due to accident. Reduced to extent of prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Treatment of Cataract and diseases of anterior/posterior chamber of Eye, Diseases of ENT, Diseases related to Thyroid, Benign diseases of breast
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Subcutaneous Benign Lumps, Sebaceous cyst, Dermoid cyst, Mucous cyst lip/cheek, Carpal Tunnel Syndrome, Trigger Finger, Lipoma, Neurofibroma, Fibroadenoma, Ganglion and similar pathology
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All treatments for Diseases related to Tendon, Ligament, Fascia, Bones and Joint including Arthroscopy and Arthroplasty/Joint Replacement (other than caused by accident)
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All types of treatment for Degenerative disc and Vertebral diseases including Replacement of bones and joints and Degenerative diseases of Musculo-skeletal system, Prolapse of Intervertebral Disc (other than caused by accident)
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All treatments related to Hepato-pancreato-biliary diseases including Gall bladder and Pancreatic calculi. All types of management for Kidney and Genitourinary tract calculi
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All types of Hernia
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Desmoid Tumor, Umbilical Granuloma, Umbilical Sinus, Umbilical Fistula
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All treatments related to all Diseases of Cervix, Uterus, Fallopian tubes, Ovaries, Uterine Bleeding, Pelvic Inflammatory Diseases
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All Diseases of Prostate, Stricture Urethra, all Obstructive Uropathies
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Benign Tumours of Epididymis, Spermatocele, Varicocele, Hydrocele
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Fistula, Fissure in Ano, Hemorrhoids, Pilonidal Sinus and Fistula, Rectal Prolapse, Stress Incontinence
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Varicose veins and Varicose ulcers
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: All types of transplant and related surgeries
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Congenital Internal disease/defect
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: Silver Plan: 24 months. Gold Plan: 12 months. Does not apply for accidents. Reduced by prior coverage under portability

waiting_periods.disease_or_procedure: Delivery Expenses (Gold Plan only)
waiting_periods.reduction_conditions: 12 months waiting period from date of commencement of first Super Surplus Insurance Policy and continuous renewal

sub_limits.description: Rs.50,000 additional indemnity once if sum insured exhausted

sub_limits.item_name: Recharge Benefit - Gold Plan (Defined Limit Rs.5L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.75,000 additional indemnity once if sum insured exhausted

sub_limits.item_name: Recharge Benefit - Gold Plan (Defined Limit Rs.10L)
sub_limits.description: Rs.1,00,000 additional indemnity once if sum insured exhausted

deductible_conditions.description: Deductible per hospitalization indicated in schedule. Pre and post hospitalization expenses not counted for calculating deductible

Company liability begins when aggregate admissible hospitalization expenses exceed the Defined limit. Amount payable is excess of defined limit, not exceeding Sum Insured. Pre and post hospitalization expenses not counted

recharge_benefit.conditions: Provided once if sum insured exhausted during policy period. Can be used even for same hospitalization or disease. Unutilized amount cannot be carried forward. Not available for Modern Treatments

wellness_services.conditions: Available through Star Health Mobile App. For newly wedded spouse or newborn added midterm, benefit available only after 1 year of insurance cover. Subject to IRDAI guidelines

e_medical_opinion.description: Facility to obtain E Medical Opinion from Company's expert panel based on medical records submitted
e_medical_opinion.conditions: Must be specifically requested. Opinion given without examining patient. For medical reasons only, not medico-legal. Company not liable for errors/omissions/consequences

moratorium_period.description: After 60 continuous months of coverage (including portability and migration), no policy/claim contestable except on grounds of established fraud
moratorium_period.applicable_to: Sum insured of first policy. For enhanced SI, 60 months from enhancement date on enhanced limits only

migration_option.plan: Gold Plan only - Special Option at 6th year
migration_option.description: At beginning of 6th year or later, proposer can opt for Indemnity Health Insurance policy without defined limit with continuity benefits for average SI of preceding 5 years
conditions: All insured persons must be insured before age 50 years
No claim made during preceding 5 years
Option must be exercised for all insured persons
Current policy cannot be renewed if option exercised

cashless.network_hospitals: Available in networked hospitals only. List at www.starhealth.in
documents_required: KYC (Identity proof with Address) as per AML Guidelines

claim_submission_time.hospitalization: Within 15 days from date of discharge
claim_submission_time.post_hospitalization_silver: Within 15 days after completion of 60 days from discharge
claim_submission_time.post_hospitalization_gold: Within 15 days after completion of 90 days from discharge

documents_required: Pre Admission investigations and treatment papers
Cash receipts and reports for tests
Certificate from attending doctor regarding diagnosis
KYC (Identity proof with Address) as per AML Guidelines
NEFT documents (Customer name, Bank Account No., Name of Bank, IFSC code)

certified_copies_accepted.conditions: Certified true copies accepted if hospitalization claimed from any other source up to defined limits and documents certified by company/body from which claim was made

gold_plan_special_requirement.intimation_requirement: Intimation of ALL hospitalizations during policy period (regardless of whether claim is made) must be given within 15 days of occurrence

grace_period.coverage_during_grace: Yes, if premium paid in instalments during policy period

free_look_period.applicable_to: New individual policies only, not renewals or portability
free_look_period.refund_conditions: Refund of premium less medical examination expenses; or proportionate risk premium if risk commenced; or proportionate premium if part coverage commenced

renewal.conditions: Cannot be denied based on claims in preceding years. Request with premium must be received before policy end. Can be renewed within 30 days grace period. No loading based on individual claims experience. Coverage not available during grace period

portability.notice_period: At least 30 days before, not earlier than 60 days from renewal date
portability.continuity_benefits: Accrued waiting period benefits transferred as per IRDAI guidelines

migration.notice_period: At least 30 days before renewal date
migration.continuity_benefits: Accrued continuity benefits in waiting periods as per IRDAI guidelines

cancellation.by_policyholder: 7 days written notice. Proportionate premium refund if policy ≤1 year and no claims. Premium refund for unexpired years if policy >1 year and risk not commenced
cancellation.by_insurer: 15 days written notice on grounds of misrepresentation, non-disclosure, fraud. No premium refund

policy_conditions.territorial_limit: All medical/surgical treatments must be taken in India
policy_conditions.automatic_expiry: Upon death of insured person (cover for surviving family members continues). Upon exhaustion of sum insured

premium_payment.instalment_conditions: In event of claim, all subsequent premium instalments immediately become due and payable. Company can recover pending instalments from claim amount. No interest charged if instalment not paid on due date. Policy cancelled if instalment not paid within grace period. Coverage available during grace period if premium paid in instalments

enhancement_conditions: No claim should have been lodged or paid
Acceptance and amount at company's discretion
Exclusions Code Excl 01, 02, 03 apply afresh to enhanced amount
Silver Plan: 36 months waiting for diseases diagnosed/treated in preceding 3 policy periods
Gold Plan: 12 months waiting for diseases diagnosed/treated in preceding 3 policy periods

company_contact.address: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited, 4th Floor, Balaji Complex, No.15, Whites Lane, Whites Road, Royapettah, Chennai - 600014

subsumed_in_room_charges: Expenses related to prescription on discharge
subsumed_in_treatment_costs: Blood reservation charges and ante natal booking charges
Nutrition planning charges - Dietician charges - Diet charges

gold_plan.deductible: No - but has Defined Limit (threshold before coverage begins)
gold_plan.air_ambulance: 10% of SI (for SI Rs.7L and above)
gold_plan.recharge_benefit: Available (Rs.50K to Rs.2.5L based on Defined Limit)
